title: nepeta disticha
intro: Nepeta disticha, also known as catmint or spike catmint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as indigestion and nausea, due to its antispasmodic and carminative effects. The health benefits of Nepeta disticha include reducing inflammation and relieving anxiety, as well as acting as a natural diuretic. The herbal preparations of Nepeta disticha typically involve infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, or using the plant in combination with other herbs in tinctures and topical creams.
